hero.title:
Learn with a mentor
who's always there
hero.subtitle: AI tutor for 13 subjects: history, math, physics, chemistry and more. Explains, answers, remembers. Free.

landing.heroTitle: Forget boring textbooks. Learn in dialogue.
landing.heroSubtitle: An AI mentor who knows your level, remembers you, and explains things your way. History, math, physics and 11 more subjects.
landing.demoChatSub: Ask the question you couldn't say out loud
landing.tip1Title: Didn't get it? Ask for a different explanation
landing.tip1Desc: 'Explain it like I'm a beginner' — Mentora will rephrase the answer
landing.tip2Desc: Mentora will check what you know and what you don't
landing.tip3Title: At the end — ask 'what did I learn'
landing.tip3Desc: Mentora will summarize your session in 3–5 key points
landing.howIntroSub: No lectures, no boring tests. Just live dialogue — you ask, Mentora explains.
landing.ctaLine1: At your own pace. Ask anything.
landing.subjectsSubtitle: From school curriculum to exam preparation
landing.howSubtitle: Four steps from your first question to real progress
landing.featuresSubtitle: Not just an online textbook. A live mentor working only for you.
landing.ctaSubtitle: First 20 messages per day — free. No card required.

01.title: Open and try immediately
01.desc: No registration required. Ask your first question and get a detailed answer in a second.

02.title: Choose your subject
02.desc: 13 topics from school curriculum to exam prep. Switch anytime — your progress is saved.

03.title: Mentora remembers you
03.desc: Your style, level, pace. No need to re-explain yourself — Mentora already knows how to talk with you.

04.title: Progress becomes visible
04.desc: XP, streaks, levels per subject. See how far you've come — that's what keeps you going.

05.title: Prepare for what matters
05.desc: Exam mode with real tasks and readiness tracker. Launching summer 2026.

security.title: Ask without fear
security.desc: Conversations are encrypted with AES-256 — the same standard used by banks and Apple Pay. Data is never shared with third parties or used for advertising. Ask the question you wouldn't type into Google.

memory.title: Learns alongside you
memory.desc: Mentora's contextual memory remembers every conversation: your level, gaps, and style. With each session, explanations become more precise. Personalized learning is 76% more effective than standard.*

supportive.title: Always on your side
supportive.desc: Won't judge, won't tire, won't get frustrated. Explains the same thing a third time from a different angle, supports you when things get tough, and genuinely celebrates when you succeed. That's how a real mentor works.

ai.title: Top AI lab quality
ai.desc: Mentora runs on frontier models — the same transformer architecture powering the world's leading AI companies. RAG-retrieval, multi-level context and a specialized stack make answers more accurate than any search engine.

global.title: Knowledge without borders
global.desc: A student from India, a kid from Siberia, or an adult from Berlin — you can learn from anywhere, without a teacher or schedule. Streaks, levels and XP turn daily studying into a habit, not a chore.

price.title: Do the math
price.desc: 8 sessions with a tutor per month or unlimited access to Mentora — the choice is obvious.

hero.title: Start free.
hero.subtitle: No hidden fees. No contracts. Cancel anytime.

native.hintText: Press the button below and Mentora will switch to natural English like a native speaker

russian-history.hint: Ask about any period of Russian history — from ancient Rus to modern times
russian-history.q1: Tell me about Peter the Great and his reforms
russian-history.q2: What was the Time of Troubles?
russian-history.q3: How did World War II begin for the USSR?

world-history.hint: Ask about any historical event or era in world history
world-history.q1: Tell me about World War I
world-history.q3: How did the Roman Empire rise?

mathematics.hint: Ask about algebra, geometry, calculus or probability theory

physics.hint: Ask about physics laws, natural phenomena, or solve a problem together
physics.q3: How does a nuclear reactor work?

chemistry.hint: Ask about chemical reactions, the periodic table, or organic chemistry
chemistry.q3: How does the periodic table work?

biology.hint: Ask about living organisms, evolution, genetics or ecosystems

russian-language.hint: Ask about spelling, punctuation, or grammar rules
russian-language.q1: Negation with НЕ for different parts of speech

literature.hint: Let's discuss works of Russian and world literature

english.hint: Let's practice English — grammar, vocabulary, speaking or writing
english.q1: Explain Present Perfect vs Past Simple
english.q3: Help me write a letter in English

social-studies.hint: Ask about government, law, economics, or social phenomena

geography.hint: Ask about countries, climate, terrain, or natural zones

computer-science.hint: Ask about algorithms, programming, networks, or IT

astronomy.hint: Ask about planets, stars, galaxies, or the history of space exploration
astronomy.q1: Tell me about the Solar System

discovery.hint: Ask anything — science, history, culture, nature. Or just say 'surprise me'
discovery.q1: Surprise me with an interesting fact

default.hint: Ask me anything — I'll help you figure it out

subjectsSection.title: Subjects
subjectsSection.verifiedDesc: Full course with knowledge base and regular updates
subjectsSection.betaDesc: Subject in development — content actively expanding
subjectsSection.removeDesc: The subject will be removed from your library. You can add it back later — all progress is saved.

addSubjectModal.title: Add subject
addSubjectModal.subtitle: Choose from the catalog
addSubjectModal.allAdded: All available subjects are already added 🎉

suggestModal.title: Suggest a subject
suggestModal.subtitle: Tell us what subject to add to Mentora
suggestModal.commentPlaceholder: Why is this subject needed, for what grade or goal...

faq.a1: Yes. The free plan requires no card — sign up and start right away. You can even try the demo chat on the homepage without an account.
faq.a2: With Pro there's no limit on messages per day. Study as much as you want.
faq.q3: When will new subjects be added?
faq.a3: Math, biology and English will be first. Pro subscribers will get access immediately at release.
faq.a4: Ultra adds three capabilities to Pro: photograph a task — Mentora will explain the solution (live now), create a presentation on any topic (coming soon), get an audio breakdown of a complex section (coming soon).
faq.q5: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.a5: Any time in your account settings — no calls, no explanations needed.

demo.disclaimer: 20 messages per day · no card · free
